---
title: "Other Resources"
---


## Aggregate Figures 

 - [DART](https://dart.lisdatacenter.org/)
 - [IKF](https://www.lisdatacenter.org/lis-ikf-webapp/app/search-ikf-figures)
 - [Our World in Data](https://www.lisdatacenter.org/data-access/lis-in-our-world-in-data-owid/)


## Teaching Materials 

 - [Sample Files and Self-Teaching Exercises](https://www.lisdatacenter.org/resources/self-teaching/)
 - [Online Tutorial Series](https://www.lisdatacenter.org/resources/online-tutorial-series/)


 We could then add the necessary links and whatnot
